additional_rules.name: blocking-call-in-async
additional_rules.message: Blocking call in async handler (std::thread::sleep, std::fs, etc.) — use tokio async equivalents
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace std::thread::sleep with tokio::time::sleep, std::fs with tokio::fs, or use spawn_blocking for CPU-heavy work.

additional_rules.name: unwrap-in-handler
additional_rules.message: unwrap()/expect() in handler — use ? with AppError for proper error responses
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace .unwrap() with ? operator and ensure the error type implements IntoResponse via AppError.

additional_rules.name: unwrap-in-service
additional_rules.message: unwrap()/expect() in service — prefer returning Result with descriptive error
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace .unwrap() with .map_err() or ? and a custom error type.

additional_rules.name: db-pool-in-handler
additional_rules.message: Direct database pool usage in handler — prefer accessing DB through service layer
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move database operations to a service method. Handlers should use State<Arc<AppState>> and call service methods.

additional_boundaries.name: Handlers must not use sqlx directly
